content.speakerText: How did you even find that out-of-print book? Thanks so much!
content.speakerTextCn: 你怎么找到这本绝版书的？太感谢了！

options.text: No problem, I know how much you wanted it.
I'm sorry, I can't help you with that.
You should have asked someone else.
It cost me a lot of money.

content.explanation: 正确答案回应了对方的感谢，并表达了理解对方的需求，语气自然真诚。干扰项要么拒绝帮助（与语境矛盾），要么推卸责任，或强调金钱成本，不符合朋友间帮助的轻松语境。

content.speakerText: I owe you one for this!

options.text: Pay me back with coffee next week!
I need you to return it by Friday.
You should buy me a new book.
Don't worry about it, I'm getting paid.

content.explanation: 正确答案以轻松幽默的方式化解人情债压力，符合朋友间互动的语境。干扰项要么变成强制要求（不自然），要么暗示金钱交易（违背友谊语境），或完全不合逻辑。

content.speakerText: I really appreciate you going out of your way to find this rare edition for me.
content.speakerTextCn: 我真的很感激你特意为我找到这本稀有版本。

options.text: It was a breeze—I'm just glad you're happy!
Yeah, it was a lot of work, so you owe me.
Maybe you should ask the library next time.

content.explanation: 正确答案用口语化表达（a breeze）表达谦逊并强调对方的喜悦，自然真诚。干扰项中，第二项要求回报显得功利，第三项推卸责任，第四项虽然谦虚但语气过于冷淡，缺乏情感回应。

content.hint: 回应感谢时最自然的口语表达之一
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：You're totally welcome!（完全不用谢！）

content.template: I owe you one for this! — Just ___ the favor when I need it!
content.hint: 表示‘回报人情’的核心动词搭配
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配：return the favor（回报人情）

content.hint: 英语中轻描淡写地回应帮助的常用说法
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：It was nothing!（小菜一碟！）

content.speakerText: How did you even find that out-of-print book? Thanks so much!
content.speakerTextCn: 你怎么找到这本绝版书的？太感谢了！
expectedAnswers: No problem, I know how much you wanted it.
You're totally welcome! I searched for weeks!
It was nothing—I just checked a few online forums and voilà!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否真诚回应了感谢
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合朋友间轻松口语风格
关键词覆盖：是否使用了场景关键词如 'out-of-print', 'wanted', 'thanks'

content.speakerText: I owe you one for this!
expectedAnswers: Pay me back with coffee next week!
Forget it, really—just return the favor when I need help.
Don't even think about it—I'm happy to help!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否轻松化解了人情债压力
语言准确性：是否正确使用了 'return the favor', 'forget it' 等表达
表达自然度：语气是否友好、非正式、不生硬
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'owe you one', 'return the favor' 等核心短语

content.speakerText: I can't believe you found that rare first edition—I've been looking for it for years!
content.speakerTextCn: 我简直不敢相信你找到了这本稀有初版书——我找了它好多年了！
expectedAnswers: I'm so glad I could help! I knew you'd be thrilled.
It was a lucky find—I just happened to spot it on a collector's site.
Don't mention it! Next time, you can help me find my missing volume!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否恰当回应了对方的激动与感谢
语言准确性：语法是否正确，是否使用了恰当的表达如 'glad I could help', 'don't mention it'
表达自然度：是否使用了口语化、情感丰富的表达
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'rare', 'found', 'looking for', 'help' 等场景关键词
